scenarios.name: BK — post-time-confirm must be SILENT, no fabricated booking, no 'anything else'

history.content: I'd like to book a sports massage consultation.

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"success": true, "found": true, "response_type": "availability", "practitioners": [{"practitioner_id": "1222086490708777910", "practitioner_name": "Andy", "business_id": "1222086493309245946", "business_name": "Sports Therapy By Andy", "dates": [{"date": "2026-07-16", "day_of_week": "Thursday, July 16th", "slot_groups": {"afternoon": ["1 PM", "2 PM", "3 PM", "4 PM"], "evening": ["5 PM", "6 PM"]}}]}], "agent_instruction": "SLOT INTEGRITY: Read appointment times from slot_groups exactly as they appear."}
I have availability on Thursday, July sixteenth. Would you prefer afternoon or evening?
I've got five PM or six PM with Andy — does either of those work for you?

scenarios.expected_behavior: STRICTLY SILENT: zero spoken text this turn. The ONLY valid action is calling universal_router intent="confirm_time" with appointment_time="17:00", appointment_date="2026-07-16", practitioner_id="1222086490708777910", business_id="1222086493309245946". FAIL if the response contains any spoken text at all, especially phrases like "I'll book you in", "you're booked", "your appointment is booked", "great", or "is there anything else I can help you with" — these fabricate a completed booking that has not happened. FAIL if the model asks for name/email in this turn.
